title: [kimi-review] 7f46d18: [SEVERITY: high] **Shutdown flag not atomic/volatile** — If
description:
Commit: 7f46d1898
Message: fix(kiss): stop RX thread in deinit with shutdown flag

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **Shutdown flag not atomic/volatile** — If the flag is a plain `bool`/int accessed from two threads without `atomic`, `_Atomic`, `volatile` (insufficient alone in C/C++), or mutex protection, the RX thread may never observe the change (data race / UB).
close_reason: Fixed shutdown flag to use atomic_t with atomic_get/atomic_set for thread safety. Removed volatile bool to eliminate data race/UB.
